description: Send one-way messages to members. A lightweight capability type for collections that only need to deliver alerts and updates without channel management or message history.

operations.name: send-notification
operations.description: Send a message to one or more recipients. This is the same operation contract as communications.send-notification, allowing providers to implement both types with the same skill.

recipients.description: One or more member references (member_hash + display_name) to notify.

message.description: The notification content. Plain text. The provider may format for its platform.

urgency.description: Hint to the provider about delivery priority. Interpretation is provider-specific.

context.description: Optional structured context about what triggered the notification. Providers may use this to enrich the message (e.g., link to a project, include a summary). Schema is not prescribed — providers handle unknown fields gracefully.

sent.description: Whether the notification was successfully delivered.

error.description: Error description if sent is false.
